nodes.name: Javan sunbird
nodes.summary: The Javan sunbird or scarlet sunbird (Aethopyga mystacalis) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is endemic to Java and Bali, Indonesia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References

nodes.name: Aethopyga
nodes.summary: Aethopyga（Aethopyga）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联20种鸟类，如黑胸太阳鸟、蓝喉太阳鸟、Lovely sunbird等20种鸟类。
